metadata.name: omegax_protocol
metadata.description: OmegaX health capital markets protocol with reserve domains, health plans, funding lines, and capital classes

errors.name: Unauthorized
errors.msg: Caller is not authorized for this scope

errors.name: ProtocolEmergencyPaused
errors.msg: Protocol governance is emergency paused

errors.name: ReserveDomainInactive
errors.msg: Reserve domain is inactive

errors.name: VaultTokenAccountInvalid
errors.msg: Domain asset vault token account is missing or invalid

errors.name: HealthPlanPaused
errors.msg: Health plan is paused

errors.name: ClaimIntakePaused
errors.msg: Claim intake is paused

errors.name: CapitalSubscriptionsPaused
errors.msg: Capital subscriptions are paused

errors.name: InvalidBps
errors.msg: Invalid basis points value

errors.name: IdentifierTooLong
errors.msg: Identifier length exceeds the canonical maximum

errors.name: HealthPlanMismatch
errors.msg: Health plan mismatch

errors.name: PolicySeriesMismatch
errors.msg: Policy series mismatch

errors.name: PolicySeriesMissing
errors.msg: Policy series is missing where one is required

errors.name: SeriesLedgerUnexpected
errors.msg: Unexpected series ledger was provided

errors.name: AssetMintMismatch
errors.msg: Asset mint mismatch

errors.name: TokenAccountOwnerMismatch
errors.msg: Source token account owner does not match the signer

errors.name: TokenAccountSelfTransferInvalid
errors.msg: Source and vault token accounts must be different accounts

errors.name: VaultTokenAccountMismatch
errors.msg: Vault token account does not match the domain asset vault

errors.name: Token2022NotSupported
errors.msg: Token-2022 custody rails are not supported by this protocol version

errors.name: FeeRecipientInvalid
errors.msg: Configured fee recipient is missing or invalid

errors.name: FeeRecipientMismatch
errors.msg: Fee withdrawal recipient does not match the configured fee recipient

errors.name: FundingLineMismatch
errors.msg: Funding line mismatch

errors.name: FundingLineTypeMismatch
errors.msg: Funding line type mismatch

errors.name: ObligationMismatch
errors.msg: Obligation account mismatch

errors.name: InvalidObligationStateTransition
errors.msg: Invalid obligation state transition

errors.name: AmountExceedsOutstandingObligation
errors.msg: Amount exceeds outstanding obligation

errors.name: AmountExceedsReservedBalance
errors.msg: Amount exceeds reserved balance

errors.name: AmountExceedsApprovedClaim
errors.msg: Amount exceeds approved claim

errors.name: AmountMustBePositive
errors.msg: Amount must be greater than zero

errors.name: ClaimCaseLinkMismatch
errors.msg: Claim case linkage mismatch

errors.name: LinkedClaimMustSettleThroughObligation
errors.msg: Linked claims must settle through the obligation path

errors.name: AmountExceedsAvailableShares
errors.msg: Amount exceeds available shares

errors.name: AmountExceedsPendingRedemption
errors.msg: Amount exceeds pending redemption

errors.name: InvalidRedemptionAmount
errors.msg: Redemption amount cannot be derived from the queued share state

errors.name: RedemptionQueueOutOfOrder
errors.msg: Redemption request is not at the head of the FIFO queue

errors.name: InvalidCapitalShareState
errors.msg: Deposit shares cannot be derived from the capital class NAV state

errors.name: InvalidDepositShares
errors.msg: Deposit would mint zero shares

errors.name: MinimumSharesOutNotMet
errors.msg: Computed deposit shares are below the requested minimum

errors.name: RestrictedCapitalClass
errors.msg: Restricted capital class access failed

errors.name: CapitalClassMismatch
errors.msg: Capital class ledger mismatch

errors.name: LPPositionHasActiveCapital
errors.msg: LP position with active capital cannot be decredentialed

errors.name: LockupActive
errors.msg: Capital class lockup is still active

errors.name: InvalidLockupSeconds
errors.msg: Capital class lockup seconds cannot be negative

errors.name: AllocationCapExceeded
errors.msg: Allocation cap exceeded

errors.name: AllocationPositionMismatch
errors.msg: Allocation position mismatch

errors.name: AllocationAssetMismatch
errors.msg: LP allocation asset mint must match the pool deposit asset mint

errors.name: InsufficientFreeAllocationCapacity
errors.msg: Insufficient free allocation capacity

errors.name: InsufficientFreeReserveCapacity
errors.msg: Insufficient free reserve capacity

errors.name: ArithmeticError
errors.msg: Arithmetic overflow or underflow

errors.name: MembershipGateConfigurationInvalid
errors.msg: Membership gate configuration is invalid

errors.name: MembershipProofModeMismatch
errors.msg: Membership proof mode does not match the configured plan posture

errors.name: MembershipInviteAuthorityInvalid
errors.msg: Invite authority is missing or invalid for this plan

errors.name: MembershipInvitePermitExpired
errors.msg: Invite permit is expired

errors.name: StringTooLong
errors.msg: Bounded string field exceeds the canonical maximum

errors.name: TooManyOracleSupportedSchemas
errors.msg: Too many supported schema hashes were provided for one oracle profile

errors.name: OracleProfileInactive
errors.msg: Oracle profile is inactive

errors.name: OracleProfileUnclaimed
errors.msg: Oracle profile has not been claimed by its signing key

errors.name: InvalidClaimAttestationDecision
errors.msg: Claim attestation decision is not a recognized value

errors.name: ClaimAttestationSchemaRequired
errors.msg: Claim attestation must reference a registered schema key hash

errors.name: ClaimAttestationSchemaUnsupported
errors.msg: Oracle profile does not advertise support for the selected claim-attestation schema

errors.name: ClaimEvidenceRequired
errors.msg: Claim attestation requires a locked evidence reference

errors.name: ClaimEvidenceMismatch
errors.msg: Claim attestation evidence reference does not match the claim case

errors.name: ClaimEvidenceLocked
errors.msg: Claim evidence cannot be changed after attestations begin

errors.name: ClaimRecipientLocked
errors.msg: Claim settlement recipient is locked after approval or payout

errors.name: OracleFinalityHeld
errors.msg: Health plan has paused oracle finality

errors.name: TooManySchemaDependencies
errors.msg: Too many schema dependency addresses were provided

errors.name: DomainAssetVaultRequired
errors.msg: Fee vault initialization requires the matching domain asset vault to exist

errors.name: LiquidityPoolMismatch
errors.msg: Liquidity pool reference does not match the supplied account

errors.name: OracleProfileMismatch
errors.msg: Oracle profile reference does not match the supplied account

errors.name: SettlementOutflowAccountsRequired
errors.msg: Linked claim settlement requires the member, mint, vault token, recipient token, and token program accounts

errors.name: InsufficientStableCoverageCapacity
errors.msg: Stable coverage capacity is insufficient

errors.name: InvalidReserveAssetRole
errors.msg: Reserve asset role is invalid

errors.name: InvalidReserveOracleSource
errors.msg: Reserve asset oracle source is invalid

errors.name: ReserveAssetRailMismatch
errors.msg: Reserve asset rail mismatch

errors.name: ReserveDomainMismatch
errors.msg: Reserve domain mismatch

errors.name: ReserveAssetRailInactive
errors.msg: Reserve asset rail is inactive

errors.name: ReserveAssetRailPayoutDisabled
errors.msg: Reserve asset rail does not allow claims payout

errors.name: ReserveAssetRailCapacityDisabled
errors.msg: Reserve asset rail cannot count toward claims capacity

errors.name: ReserveAssetPriceStale
errors.msg: Reserve asset oracle price is stale or missing

errors.name: ReserveAssetPriceInvalid
errors.msg: Reserve asset oracle price is invalid

errors.name: ReserveAssetPriceConfidenceTooWide
errors.msg: Reserve asset oracle price confidence exceeds rail threshold

errors.name: PartialObligationTransitionUnsupported
errors.msg: Partial obligation lifecycle transitions are not supported

errors.name: InvalidObligationDeliveryMode
errors.msg: Invalid obligation delivery mode

errors.name: ClaimAdjudicationLocked
errors.msg: Claim adjudication is locked after payout or terminal state

errors.name: ReserveAssetMintDecimalsUnsupported
errors.msg: Reserve asset mint decimals are unsupported

errors.name: HealthPlanInactive
errors.msg: Health plan is inactive

errors.name: CapitalClassInactive
errors.msg: Capital class is inactive

errors.name: DirectClaimReserveUnsupported
errors.msg: Direct claim reserves require linked obligation settlement

errors.name: LiquidityPoolInactive
errors.msg: Liquidity pool is inactive

errors.name: AllocationPositionInactive
errors.msg: Allocation position is inactive or deallocation-only

fields.name: shares
docs: Minimum accepted shares out; zero means accept the program-derived
NAV share price with no minimum.
